description:
Define CLI interface following godeps-gen/rustdeps-gen patterns:
- Input flags: --pyproject, --requirements (mutually exclusive or combinable?)
- Output flag: -o for explicit file output
- --no-prefetch flag for testing without network
- --include-dev flag to include dev dependencies
- Consider how to handle extras (e.g., package[extra])
- Consider version constraints vs pinned versions
title: Design pydeps-gen CLI interface and flags
